mapper.insert: INSERT INTO local_activity_admin (organizer_user_id, title, subtitle, category_code, description, location_text, capacity, fee_type, fee_amount, allow_waitlist, require_checkin, status, start_at, end_at, reminder_minutes,review_note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{organizerUserId}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{categoryCode}, #{description}, #{locationText}, #{capacity}, #{feeType}, #{feeAmount}, #{allowWaitlist}, #{requireCheckin}, #{status}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{reminderMinutes}, #{reviewNote}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, organizer_user_id, title, subtitle, category_code, description, location_text, capacity, fee_type, fee_amount, allow_waitlist, require_checkin, status, start_at, end_at, reminder_minutes, review_note, address, latitude, longitude, cover_url FROM local_activity

SELECT a.id, a.organizer_user_id, u.username AS organizer, a.title, a.subtitle, a.category_code AS category, a.description, COALESCE(a.location_text, a.address) AS location, a.latitude, a.longitude, a.address, a.cover_url, a.capacity, COALESCE(en.reserved, 0) AS reserved, a.fee_type, a.fee_amount, a.allow_waitlist, a.require_checkin, a.status, a.start_at, a.end_at, a.reminder_minutes, a.review_note FROM local_activity a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = a.organizer_user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT activity_id, COUNT(*) AS reserved FROM local_activity_enrollment WHERE status IN ('confirmed', 'checked_in', 'completed') GROUP BY activity_id ) en ON en.activity_id = a.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT tag FROM local_activity_tag WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY tag
SELECT e.status FROM local_activity_enrollment e JOIN users u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.activity_id = #{activityId} AND u.username = #{username} ORDER BY e.id DESC LIMIT 1
